category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Tracy as a real-time remote telemetry hybrid frame and sampling profiler.
source_facts.description says it is a real-time, nanosecond resolution frame profiler.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Tracy Profiler.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides overview, build, release, and documentation links.
Official GitHub README says release assets contain the tracy.pdf documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; repo intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists profiling CPU, GPU, memory allocations, locks, context switches, and game/application use cases.
